rbi.requirement: Model must produce human-interpretable explanations for every fraud flag
rbi.evidence: GradCAM heatmaps + SHAP patch importance + Attention Rollout implemented
rbi.notes: Regulators may demand per-decision explanation for loans > ₹1 Cr

rbi.requirement: Model accuracy must exceed 90% on held-out test set
rbi.notes: Accuracy below threshold requires human-in-the-loop for ALL decisions

rbi.requirement: Human override mechanism mandatory for AI fraud decisions
rbi.evidence: Human Review Queue with priority routing implemented; auditor override recorded in audit trail

rbi.requirement: Model must be retrained or monitored at least quarterly
rbi.evidence: Model retraining cycle set to 90 days; drift detection via MLOps monitoring

rbi.requirement: Confidence calibration: ECE < 0.05 for high-stakes decisions
rbi.notes: Miscalibrated models may overstate confidence on genuine documents, missing fraud

rbi.requirement: Audit trail: all predictions logged with timestamp, user, model version
rbi.evidence: All predictions stored in SQLite DB with user_id, model_name, created_at, confidence

rbi.requirement: Data used for training must not include personally identifiable information (PII)
rbi.evidence: Training data contains document images only; no customer name/account data in ML pipeline

basel.requirement: Operational risk events (fraud) must be tracked and reported
basel.framework: BASEL III Pillar 1 — Standardised Measurement Approach (SMA)
basel.evidence: FraudTrendEngine generates daily/weekly/monthly fraud statistics with anomaly flagging

basel.requirement: Model risk must be quantified and included in capital computation
basel.evidence: Uncertainty quantification (MC Dropout) provides model risk scores per prediction; formal capital charge not computed
basel.notes: Quantitative model risk charge requires actuarial approval — recommend quarterly review

basel.requirement: Stress testing: model performance under adversarial/out-of-distribution inputs
basel.evidence: Adversarial testing (FGSM, PGD) + Robustness testing (Gaussian noise, JPEG artifacts) completed

basel.framework: BASEL III Model Risk Management SR 11-7
basel.evidence: Internal validation completed; external validation by risk team recommended before production

fatf.requirement: Suspicious document patterns flagged and escalated to compliance
fatf.evidence: Fraud-predicted documents auto-queued for human review; branch hotspot reports generated

fatf.requirement: Risk-based approach: higher scrutiny for high-value / high-risk transactions
fatf.evidence: Risk level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL) assigned per prediction; CRITICAL routed to MLRO

fatf.requirement: Record keeping: fraud evidence retained for minimum 5 years
fatf.evidence: Predictions stored in DB; retention policy and backup schedule to be configured
fatf.notes: Configure database backup and retention schedule before production deployment
